description: Line 50 of lib.rs uses the intra-doc link `[`secretx`]` in the phrase 'not part of the [`secretx`] umbrella'. `secretx` is not listed as a dependency of `secretx-signature` (see Cargo.toml), so rustdoc cannot resolve it. With `RUSTDOCFLAGS="-D warnings"` (required by the pre-push checklist for docsrs builds) this becomes a hard error: `error: unresolved link to `secretx`` and `cargo doc` exits non-zero. Confirmed: `RUSTDOCFLAGS="--cfg docsrs -D warnings" cargo +nightly doc --no-deps --all-features -p secretx-signature` fails. Fix: replace the intra-doc link with a plain-text reference such as 'not part of the secretx umbrella crate'.
title: Broken intra-doc link to crate secretx
